title.zh: CVE-2022-22947：Spring Cloud Gateway 远程代码执行漏洞
title.en: CVE-2022-22947: Spring Cloud Gateway Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

description.zh: Spring Cloud Gateway 远程代码执行漏洞 CVE-2022-22947 的复现分析，包括漏洞利用工具使用、攻击原理和检测思路。
description.en: Reproduction analysis of Spring Cloud Gateway remote code execution vulnerability CVE-2022-22947, including exploitation tool usage, attack principles and detection approaches.

content.zh: 分析 CVE-2022-22947 Spring Cloud Gateway RCE 漏洞
content.en: Analyze CVE-2022-22947 Spring Cloud Gateway RCE vulnerability

annotation.en: User requests analysis of Spring Cloud Gateway vulnerability

content.zh: 漏洞概述：Spring Cloud Gateway 3.1.0、3.0.0-3.0.6 及旧的不受支持版本存在远程代码执行漏洞。漏洞利用通过 actuator gateway API 注入恶意路由，通过 Spring Expression Language (SpEL) 实现代码执行。靶场启动：java -jar spring-gateway-demo-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --debug，服务监听 9000 端口。
content.en: Vulnerability overview: Spring Cloud Gateway 3.1.0, 3.0.0-3.0.6 and older unsupported versions have remote code execution vulnerability. Exploitation works by injecting malicious routes through actuator gateway API, achieving code execution via Spring Expression Language (SpEL). Target setup: java -jar spring-gateway-demo-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --debug, service listens on port 9000.

content.zh: 如何识别目标是否存在该漏洞？
content.en: How to identify if target has this vulnerability?

content.zh: 识别方法：1) 访问 /actuator 端点，查看返回的 _links 中是否包含 gateway 字段；2) curl http://localhost:9000/actuator 返回 gateway 路由链接即可确认目标使用 Spring Cloud Gateway。修复方案：3.1.x 升级到 3.1.1+，3.0.x 升级到 3.0.7+，或设置 management.endpoint.gateway.enabled 为 false。
content.en: Identification method: 1) Access /actuator endpoint, check if returned _links contain gateway field; 2) curl http://localhost:9000/actuator returns gateway route link confirms target uses Spring Cloud Gateway. Fix: 3.1.x upgrade to 3.1.1+, 3.0.x upgrade to 3.0.7+, or set management.endpoint.gateway.enabled to false.

content.zh: 漏洞利用的 EXP 如何使用？
content.en: How to use the vulnerability EXP?

content.zh: EXP 使用方法：1) 使用 Go 编写的漏洞利用工具：go build main.go；2) 执行攻击：./main -u http://127.0.0.1:9000 -c whoami，成功返回当前用户。检测思路：通过分析 HTTP 流量，检测是否存在异常访问 actuator gateway API 的请求，关注 POST /actuator/gateway/routes 和 POST /actuator/gateway/refresh 请求。
content.en: EXP usage: 1) Use Go-based exploitation tool: go build main.go; 2) Execute attack: ./main -u http://127.0.0.1:9000 -c whoami, successfully returns current user. Detection approach: Analyze HTTP traffic to detect abnormal access to actuator gateway API, focus on POST /actuator/gateway/routes and POST /actuator/gateway/refresh requests.
